title: Technology in the World's Magnets
description: A simple mod in which you can get iron nuggets from gravel with magnets.
body:
!  This Mod is only created for the "Technology in the World" Modpack 


A simple mod in which you can get iron nuggets from gravel with magnets.
To get a nugget, you have to right-click (hold down) with the magnet on a gravel block. How long you have to last to get a nugget depends on the tier of the magnet

| Tier          | Duration|
|----------|---------:|
| Basic       | 100         |
| Iron          | 40          |
| Gold         | 20          |
| Diamond | 10           |

This Mod had now crafting recipes to craft a magnet, but the Magnetite(need to craft a Magnet) had no crafting recipe.
The durability System of the Magnet is not implementated yet too

This Mod add a item named "Magnetite", bot this is only used in the crafting recipes, which will be added in the next Updates
